message:
feat(tests): improve git commit detection in dataset registry with env override and parent repo discovery

Enhance the dataset registry's git commit detection to work reliably in
offloaded/RCH build environments and nested subdirectories:

- Add BR_DATASET_SOURCE_COMMIT env var override for CI/RCH environments
  where .git metadata may not be available in synced checkouts
- Remove requirement for .git directory to exist at dataset root, since
  Git can discover parent repositories from subdirectories and worktrees
  may provide Git context without a literal .git entry
- Add compile-time fallback via VERGEN_GIT_SHA for in-tree paths when
  runtime git discovery fails
- Add source_commit_override_with() helper with whitespace trimming and
  empty-value filtering for robust env var handling
- Add test for parent repo discovery from subdirectories
- Add test for env override trimming and empty value rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
